title: Distribute Credentials Securely Using Secrets — Create a Secret directly with kubectl
text:
If you want to skip the Base64 encoding step, you can create the
same Secret using the
kubectl create secret
command. For example:
kubectl create secret generic test-secret --from-literal
=
'username=my-app'
--from-literal
=
'password=39528$vdg7Jb'
This is more convenient. The detailed approach shown earlier runs
through each step explicitly to demonstrate what is happening.
